parameters.name: snapshotItemConfig
parameters.value: {{=toJSON(sprig.dict("label", item['label'], "snapshotPrefix", item['snapshotPrefix'], "config", fromJSON(item['config']), "repo", fromJSON(item['repo']), "semaphoreConfigMapName", item['semaphoreConfigMapName'], "semaphoreKey", item['semaphoreKey'], "dependsOnProxySetups", fromJSON(toJSON(item))['dependsOnProxySetups']))}}

parameters.name: snapshotMigrationConfig
parameters.value: {{=toJSON(sprig.dict("label", item['label'], "snapshotNameResolution", fromJSON(item['snapshotNameResolution']), "migrations", fromJSON(item['migrations']), "sourceVersion", item['sourceVersion'], "sourceLabel", item['sourceLabel'], "targetConfig", fromJSON(item['targetConfig']), "snapshotConfig", fromJSON(item['snapshotConfig']), "sourceEndpoint", sprig.dig('sourceEndpoint', '', item)))}}
